CE1.justification: Agent acted on step 1 but then asked the user multiple structured clarifying questions (Detection/Diagnosis/Mitigation/Resolution plus deploy SHA, dashboard links, customer-visibility) rather than one targeted ask.

CE2.justification: Several stretches of unneeded prose — forward-looking narration of steps 3-5, a 'notes on choices I made' section, and explanatory framing about the artifact-bound design — beyond what step-2 blocking required.

CE3.justification: Routing was stated in-band with brief why-clauses: working folder 'per runbook step 1', and projects/postmortems/ flagged as a step-5 concern that doesn't exist yet.

CE4.justification: Step 1 committed cleanly (folder + timeline shell with the four required headers); the agent halted at the natural artifact boundary before step 2, leaving no orphaned intermediates.
